name: NavCard
description: A promotional card used in Global Navigation to highlight an audience segment or product category — contains an eyebrow, title, body copy, text CTA link, and a full-width pill button.

composedOf.note: NavCardButton is a standalone GNAV CTA that follows the Nav Button component set tokens (default / hover / active).
Link component does not exist yet. Currently using a plain <a> with inline chevron SVG as a placeholder. Replace once Link is built.

props.name: eyebrow
props.description: Audience segment or category label displayed above the title.

props.name: body
props.description: Supporting body copy below the title.

props.name: ctaLinkLabel
props.description: Label for the inline text link CTA (e.g. 'See plans').

props.name: ctaLinkHref
props.description: URL for the inline text link CTA.

props.name: ctaButtonLabel
props.description: Label for the full-width pill button CTA.

props.name: ctaButtonHref
props.description: URL for the full-width pill button CTA.

props.name: interactive
props.description: When false, suppresses the card-level hover state (no dark flip) via pointer-events: none on the card root. Interactive children (button, cta-link) retain pointer-events: auto and remain clickable.

layerNames..root: Outermost card frame — background, padding, border-radius
layerNames..eyebrow: Audience/category label text node — maps to eyebrow prop
layerNames..content: Flex column wrapper: title + body + cta-link stack
layerNames..title: Primary heading — maps to title prop
layerNames..body: Body copy text node — maps to body prop
layerNames..cta-link: Text link with trailing chevron icon
layerNames..cta-link__label: Link text — maps to ctaLinkLabel prop
layerNames..cta-button: Full-width pill button at card bottom
layerNames..cta-button__label: Button label — maps to ctaButtonLabel prop

dimensions.width: NavCardShell clamps width to 340px with a 240px min (no max)
dimensions.height: Auto — text stack grows while CTA block stays pinned to 40px
dimensions.note: Shell abstraction keeps both GNAV patterns in sync. Width + padding come from the shared shell tokens; content just swaps between text and menu variants.

keyboard: Enter on either interactive element activates the link
notes: 1.4.3: Verify --s2a-color-transparent-black-64 (rgba 0,0,0,0.64) against --s2a-color-background-default and --s2a-color-transparent-white-64 against --s2a-color-background-knockout at 4.5:1 for 14px text.
The eyebrow is presentational context — it does not need to be the accessible name. The title should anchor the card's accessible identity.

Both CTAs must have distinct accessible labels. If ctaLinkLabel and ctaButtonLabel are generic ('See plans' / 'Explore'), pair them with a visually-hidden reference to the card title for screen reader context.
